title: Richard Benson - Renegade (1984) Anteprima mondiale
description:
Su gentile concessione dell'utente Souls of Renegades finalmente arrivano le canzoni inedite su internet dopo anniiiii, tenete conto che prima di oggi chi voleva sentire questa canzone doveva nel migliore dei casi sborsare centinaia di euro e nessuno l'ha mai pubblicata prima d'ora.

I can't tell you what I feel 
I don't know what to say
I just can't live without you
I want you to stay

Don't look at me fade away
I'm reaching something in the rain
I just can't lose all the battles
only one side can win
I'm renegade don't go away
No lovers will change your fate
I'm renegade don't go away
No woman will replace your blade

Don't talk to me that way
as I tremble on the phone
you make arrows out of pointed words
you were ready for the call
We are strangers to each other
far from home, and yet together
Just acting rehearsed routines
with so much space in between
I'm renegade don't go away
No lovers will change your fate
I'm renegade don't go away
No woman will replace your blade
Your blade!
I'm renegade don't go away
No lovers will change your fate
I'm renegade don't go away
No woman will replace your blade
I'm renegade
No lovers will change your fate
I'm renegade don't go away 
I'm renegade
(Trascrizione a cura sempre del mitico Andrea Baixinho già autore della trascrizione di Exotic Escape)
